title: Burro Creek Falls, Skagway
description: Burro Creek Falls near Skagway, Alaska — a rocky waterfall in the temperate rainforest within walking distance of the Skagway waterfront. The Skagway area combines dramatic mountain scenery with accessible forest trails.
